command:
python - <<'PY'
def valid(cpf):
    if len(cpf)!=11 or len(set(cpf))==1: return False
    nums=[int(c) for c in cpf]
    for i in [9,10]:
        s=sum(nums[j]*(i+1-j) for j in range(i))
        d=(s*10)%11
        if d==10: d=0
        if nums[i]!=d: return False
    return True
for cpf in ['52998224725','39053344705','98765432100','71402594060','15350946056','11144477735','93541134780','35779773005']:
    print(cpf, valid(cpf))
PY
